content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach uses several AoA-aligned moves: the 'what would you do if' question (turn 2) gestures toward locating the unseen choice, the fear question (turn 4) is a signature 'what are you scared of feeling' move deployed appropriately when the client is in a defended trap-story, and turn 6 invokes feel-over-figure by locating sensation in the body. Turn 12 ('What's actually not fine?') is a solid I-don't-buy-your-story move, and turn 14 ('what does that do to you?') keeps the feeling-toward orientation. However, the coach never names the live frameworks — no fear triangle invocation despite a clear aggressive-victim stance, no naming of the trappedness or the helplessness/shame underneath, and no empowered-vs-power distinction setup. Signature questions from the expected territory (what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want, what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome) are not used. The body question in turn 6 is technically a signature move but comes a bit early and gets bounced — the client experiences it as decoration, suggesting the deployment was slightly premature. Mostly appropriate hits but thin on framework-naming and missing the higher-leverage signature questions for this scenario.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Counterfactual question gestures toward locating the unseen choice; AoA-aligned opening rather than validating the trap."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what are you scared of feeling' question deployed at an appropriate moment when client is defending the trap-story."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Body-locating question is a signature feel-over-figure move but lands slightly early; client bounces it. Appropriate type, marginal timing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflection that honors the somatic carrying — keeps feel-over-figure alive without strategizing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'I don't buy your story' style move — refuses to accept 'it's fine' and points at the incongruence. Strong AoA fidelity."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What does that do to you' keeps orientation toward feeling rather than figuring; appropriate after client named invisibility."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fear-triangle", "aggressive-victim-stance", "trappedness-feeling", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "fight-or-roll-over-binary"],
  "notes": "Mostly appropriate signature moves but no framework naming and key signature questions for the scenario were not deployed. Solid 2 — not a hedge; genuinely between thin presence and full fidelity."
}
